'''Yang Wood Rat''' is the 1st of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 甲 Kinoe (yang wood, the gaia-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 子 Ne, the [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's water generates the stem's wood, feeding the heavens from below.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Water Pig]] (node 60) and [[Yin Wood Ox]] (node 2).

== Folk reading ==
The opening node of the cycle is read as the '''year of renewed mandate'''. Temple chronologists in many ringworld traditions refuse to declare a new era-name outside a Yang Wood Rat year, holding that the wheel of heaven re-judges the ruling line at this turn and that any reign-title announced under a different node sits unstably on the throne.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoe (甲)]] — yang wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat (子)]] — yang water
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Water Pig]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Wood Ox]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1190890}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
